name: Fungal Blight
description: A cluster of aggressive fungal life lashes out from the undergrowth.

name: Fungal Boss
description: A swollen bloom-creature towers over the grove and commands lesser spores.

name: Lost Cache
description: You discover an old field stash hidden beneath roots and tarp.

name: Wildlife Tracks
description: Fresh tracks reveal recent wildlife activity nearby.

name: Spore Storm
description: A drifting cloud of active spores sweeps across the area.

name: River Drifter
description: A waterlogged crate, corpse, or mystery bundle drifts by.
